title: Schema Translation Catalog
description: Wave 133d / Plan-2 P1#7: Per-family schema-to-English translation catalog. Lives at schemas/training/schema_translation_catalog.<family>.yaml. Loaded by Trainforge.generators.schema_translation_generator._load_form_data, dispatched on PropertyManifest.family. The rdf_shacl family currently has no YAML on disk — the in-Python _RDF_SHACL_FALLBACK_FORM_DATA dict is the byte-identical fallback. New course families ship their YAML against this schema.

family.description: Course-family identifier matching the corresponding property_manifest.<family>.yaml's family field. Optional but recommended for cross-reference.

description.description: Optional one-paragraph rationale: which surface forms this catalog covers and why.

forms.description: Map keyed by primary CURIE (e.g. 'sh:datatype'). Each entry seeds the six template families authored by the generator (definition / usage / comparison / reasoning / pitfall / combination). CURIEs absent from this map are skipped with a warning at synthesis time.

short_name.description: Human-readable short name for the construct (e.g. 'datatype' for sh:datatype). Used in decision-capture rationale interpolation.

definitions.description: Hand-curated definition strings rendering the CURIE in different cognitive angles (formal-spec / pedagogical / context-anchored / etc.). Each becomes one schema_translation.definition pair via a rotating prompt frame.

usage_examples.description: List of (prompt, completion) pairs showing concrete TTL usage. Authored fully — no prompt frame applied. Each becomes one schema_translation.usage pair.

comparison_targets.description: List of (other_curie, contrast_explanation) pairs. The generator wraps with a comparison prompt frame; the completion must contain BOTH the primary CURIE and the secondary CURIE literally for preserve_tokens recognition.

reasoning_scenarios.description: List of (scenario_prompt, completion_with_curie) pairs probing applied reasoning. Authored fully.

pitfalls.description: List of (scenario_prompt, completion_with_curie) pairs documenting error modes + corrections. Authored fully.

combinations.description: List of (other_curie, composition_explanation) pairs. The generator wraps with a combination prompt frame; the completion must contain BOTH the primary CURIE and the secondary CURIE literally.
